reasoning: The search summary indicates that the Philadelphia Eagles won Super Bowl LIX and opened as the preseason favorites for Super Bowl LX with odds ranging from +600 to +700. These odds translate to an implied probability of about 12.5% to 14.3%. After removing the sportsbook vig (which is typically high for futures markets), the true implied probability is approximately 10-11%. While the team retains key young talent and a strong defense, winning back-to-back Super Bowls is historically very difficult, and the summary mentions a tough schedule for the 2025-2026 season. We lack specific updates on their mid-season performance (as of November 2025), so staying close to the vig-adjusted preseason odds is the most well-calibrated approach.
batch_queries: Will the Philadelphia Eagles win Super Bowl 2026?
